title: The Battlefield Goes Silent
description: On pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part focuses on a kingdom wakes from war. Alabasta starts facing the aftermath of Crocodile’s deception while Vivi, Cobra, the rebels, and the Straw Hats recover from the civil war.
scene: This scene belongs to the A Kingdom Wakes from War sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, King Cobra, Smoker, Tashigi.
summary: Alabasta starts facing the aftermath of Crocodile’s deception while Vivi, Cobra, the rebels, and the Straw Hats recover from the civil war.
